title: aster albescens var. glandulosus
intro: Aster albescens var. glandulosus, also known as White Aster or Glandular White Aster, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems like bronchitis. Aster albescens var. glandulosus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal benefits, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
